name: v-review
description: The future-check code review skill. Triggered by 'review this branch', 'review my PR', 'look at the diff'. Walks a 17-item hunt list (silent catches, cargo additions, duplicate helpers, parallel-instance config drift, UI-only authz, etc.), dispatches security and language-specific reviewers in parallel, stages fixes, refuses to commit eagerly. Suggests (does not auto-install) companion skills and subagents — see README for the recommended list.

recommendedCompanions.note: Not auto-installed. v-review probes availability at pre-flight and degrades gracefully when missing. See README for install hints.
